How this report works: FF is calculated from FFScouter's public BSS estimates using FF = 1 + (8/3 × defender BSS / attacker BSS). It is an estimate, not a guaranteed fight outcome. Use each member's maximum FF score slider to filter their targets between FF 0.5 and 900. FFScouter battle stats are never changed. Generated 21 Jul 2026, 15:59.
